response_text:
## Sources for Comparing Tax Revenue as % of GDP

Here are the most reliable sources:

### International Organizations
- **OECD** (stats.oecd.org) - "Revenue Statistics" database; excellent for OECD member countries
- **World Bank** (data.worldbank.org) - search "tax revenue % of GDP"; broader country coverage
- **IMF** (imf.org) - Government Finance Statistics; good for developing economies
- **Our World in Data** (ourworldindata.org) - user-friendly charts and visualizations

### Specific Tools
- **OECD Tax Database** - allows detailed breakdowns by tax type
- **IMF Fiscal Monitor** - published twice yearly with comparative data
- **World Bank Open Data** - downloadable datasets

### Practical Recommendations
| If you want... | Use... |
|----------------|--------|
| Easy visualization | Our World in Data |
| Detailed OECD comparisons | OECD.Stat |
| Developing country data | World Bank or IMF |
| Historical trends | IMF or World Bank |

### Things to Note
- Definitions of "tax revenue" can vary slightly between sources
- Some countries have significant **subnational taxes** that may or may not be included
- Data lag is typically **1-3 years**

Would you like help interpreting the data or finding a specific country comparison?

## Sources for Comparing Tax Revenue as % of GDP

Here are the most reliable sources:

### International Organizations
- **OECD** (stats.oecd.org) - "Revenue Statistics" database; excellent for OECD member countries
- **World Bank** (data.worldbank.org) - search "tax revenue % of GDP"; broader country coverage
- **IMF** (imf.org) - Government Finance Statistics; good for developing economies
- **Our World in Data** (ourworldindata.org) - user-friendly charts and visualizations

### Specific Tools
- **OECD Tax Database** - allows detailed breakdowns by tax type
- **IMF Fiscal Monitor** - published twice yearly with comparative data
- **World Bank Open Data** - downloadable datasets

### Practical Recommendations
| If you want... | Use... |
|----------------|--------|
| Easy visualization | Our World in Data |
| Detailed OECD comparisons | OECD.Stat |
| Developing country data | World Bank or IMF |
| Historical trends | IMF or World Bank |

### Things to Note
- Definitions of "tax revenue" can vary slightly between sources
- Some countries have significant **subnational taxes** that may or may not be included
- Data lag is typically **1-3 years**
